// Style: PLAIN at size 14
const WIDTHS_14_PLAIN: &[(u8, f64)] = &[
    (32, 4.429687500000000), // ' '
    (33, 4.429687500000000), // '!'
    (34, 5.229492187500000), // '"'
    (35, 8.852539062500000), // '#'
    (36, 8.852539062500000), // '$'
    (37, 9.358398437500000), // '%'

// PLAIN: ascent=14 descent=3 height=17 leading=0
//   LineMetrics: ascent=13.5351562500 descent=2.9531250000 leading=0.0000000000 height=16.4882812500
// BOLD: ascent=14 descent=3 height=17 leading=0
//   LineMetrics: ascent=13.5351562500 descent=2.9531250000 leading=0.0000000000 height=16.4882812500
// ITALIC: ascent=14 descent=3 height=17 leading=0
//   LineMetrics: ascent=13.5351562500 descent=2.9531250000 leading=0.0000000000 height=16.4882812500
// BOLD_ITALIC: ascent=14 descent=3 height=17 leading=0
//   LineMetrics: ascent=13.5351562500 descent=2.9531250000 leading=0.0000000000 height=16.4882812500

// Format verification:
// 32.723632812500000 -> "32.7236"
// 25.463867187500000 -> "25.4639"
// 0.500000000000000 -> "0.5000"
// 1.000000000000000 -> "1.0000"
// 10.000000000000000 -> "10.0000"
